title: Kubernetes Security Advisories - 2024-10-11
description:
Merged 2 kubernetes security advisories published on 2024-10-11. Original advisory IDs: CVE-2024-9486, CVE-2024-9594

Titles:
- VM images built with Image Builder and Proxmox provider use default credentials
- VM images built with Image Builder with some providers use default credentials during builds
affected: kubernetes:Kubernetes Image Builder versions <= v0.1.37
kubernetes:### How do I mitigate this vulnerability?
kubernetes:Rebuild any affected images using a fixed version of Image Builder. Re-deploy the fixed images to any affected VMs.
kubernetes:Prior to upgrading, this vulnerability can be mitigated by disabling the builder account on affected VMs:
kubernetes:usermod -L builder
kubernetes:#### Fixed Versions
kubernetes:Kubernetes Image Builder master - fixed by https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/image-builder/pull/1595
kubernetes:Fixed in Kubernetes Image Builder release v0.1.38
kubernetes:### Detection
kubernetes:The linux command `last builder` can be used to view logins to the affected `builder` account.
kubernetes:If you find evidence that this vulnerability has been exploited, please contact security@kubernetes.io
kubernetes:## Additional Details
kubernetes:The fixed version makes two changes to remedy this bug:
kubernetes:It sets a randomly-generated password for the duration of the image build
kubernetes:It disables the builder account at the conclusion of the image build
kubernetes:#### Acknowledgements
kubernetes:This vulnerability was reported by Nicolai Rybnikar @rybnico from Rybnikar Enterprises GmbH.
kubernetes:The issue was fixed and coordinated by Marcus Noble of the Image Builder project.
kubernetes:/area security
kubernetes:/kind bug
kubernetes:/committee security-response
kubernetes:/label official-cve-feed
kubernetes:/sig cluster-lifecycle
